description: kakao.golf is a golf reservation service operated by Kakao VX, showing tee times, regional searches, and booking-related content on its website. Public evidence of developer-facing integrations beyond the detected MCP endpoint was not found.
summary: kakao.golf exposes an MCP endpoint detected at `http://www.kakao.golf/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json`; no public developer docs, API references, GraphQL endpoints, or CLI documentation were found, and authentication could not be determined.
